name: UwsIdsDmCustSvcDmHiVoltCntctExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH SourceData AS (SELECT T.TM_PERD_CD, T.EFF_DT_SK, T.TERM_DT_SK, T.CNTCT_THRSHLD_NO, T.USER_ID, T.LAST_UPDT_DT_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_UWSOwner}.CUST_SVC_HI_VOL_CNTCT T) SELECT 'UWS' AS SRC_SYS_CD, TM_PERD_CD, CASE WHEN EFF_DT_SK IS NULL OR LTRIM(RTRIM(EFF_DT_SK))='' OR EFF_DT_SK='UNK' OR LTRIM(RTRIM(EFF_DT_SK))='NA' THEN CAST('1753-01-01' AS DATETIME) ELSE CAST(EFF_DT_SK AS DATETIME) END AS EFF_DT, CASE WHEN TERM_DT_SK IS NULL OR LTRIM(RTRIM(TERM_DT_SK))='' OR EFF_DT_SK='UNK' OR LTRIM(RTRIM(EFF_DT_SK))='NA' THEN CAST('1753-01-01' AS DATETIME) ELSE CAST(TERM_DT_SK AS DATETIME) END AS TERM_DT, CNTCT_THRSHLD_NO, USER_ID, CAST(LAST_UPDT_DT_SK AS DATETIME) AS LAST_UPDT_DT, @{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO FROM SourceData

Description:

Documentation: Pulls data from UWS(CUST_SVC_HI_VOL_CNTCT) table and loads in to a Datamart(CUST_SVC_DM_HI_VOL_CNTCT) table.

Annotations:
Write CUST_SVC_DM_HI_VOL_CNTCT Data into a Sequential file for Load Job UwsIdsDmCustSvcDmHiVoltCntctLoad.
Add Defaults and Null Handling.
Job Name: UwsIdsDmCustSvcDmHiVoltCntctExtr
Read from source table CUST_SVC_HI_VOL_CNTCT from UWS.
